expect: Sink rate >20%. L-601 hub dominance >5x gap to #2. Top-10 hub concentration >15%. citation_amplify.py built and runnable in <30s on WSL.
diff: All predictions CONFIRMED. Sink rate 23.7% > 20%. Hub gap 7.4x > 5x. Concentration 17.6% > 15%. Tool built and functional. Unexpected: many recent high-Sharpe lessons (S506, Sharpe 9-10) are sinks — recency bias in sink population.
falsified_if: Sink rate drops below 15% without structural intervention (would mean organic citation closes the loop). Hub gap drops below 3x (would mean L-601 monopoly is self-limiting).
successor: Wire --orient output into orient_sections.py as new section. Test: does making sinks visible in orient increase their re-citation rate over 30 sessions?
